wordplay_note: Simple name suggesting smallness or malice
card_description: Mali is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Galactic Pot-Healer*. Female pot-healer who becomes Joe's love interest on Plowman's Planet. Name note: Simple name suggesting smallness or malice. Romance amid cosmic labor — connection between workers on a divine project. First appears in *Galactic Pot-Healer*.

reference.brief: Female pot-healer who becomes Joe's love interest on Plowman's Planet
reference.significance: Romance amid cosmic labor — connection between workers on a divine project
